title: DRAS-5: Dynamic Risk Assessment State Machine for Clinical Decision Support
description: A formally verified five-state risk-assessment state machine that guarantees zero missed escalations (constraint C1) while permitting controlled, cooling-period-gated de-escalation (constraint C5). Includes the reference implementation, a deterministic seed-42 evaluation driver (scripts/run_all.py) that regenerates every reported metric to committed CSVs under results/, the figure generators, and REPRODUCIBILITY.md documenting exactly which manuscript results are reproducible.
